architectReview.evidence: Iterative review chain: 31-G004ArchReview confirmed the ACP transactional re-key/bridge refresh and notification gate-presentation migration resolved their HIGH findings but blocked on two remaining FileGateStore HIGHs (shallow semantic validation permitting unverified answer replay; non-durable quarantine directory entries). Leader fixed both (full DTO validation with schema compilation/hash verification and dual answer-hash recomputation; fsyncParentDirectory after marker creation and all renames). 33-G004ArchRecheck returned WATCH/APPROVE with one MEDIUM/P2 completeness gap (literal required:true, options entries, telegram ack updatedAt/outcome), which was then closed with targeted validators and quarantine fixtures. Final recheck 34-G004ArchFinal: Status CLEAR, Verdict APPROVE, no findings, and confirmed the post-review rebase onto origin/dev e3e861ce retained every approved fix.

executorQa.reviewer: executor subagents 32-G004ExecQa (G004 adversarial) and 27-G003ExecQa (G003 focused probes), plus leader verification
e2eCommands: bun test test/acp-agent.test.ts test/extensions-runner.test.ts test/workflow-gate-broker.test.ts test/agent-wire/agent-wire-scopes.test.ts test/notifications-config.test.ts test/notifications-session-switch.test.ts test/notifications-token.test.ts test/notifications-app-server-unwired.test.ts test/notifications-ask-selected-ack.test.ts test/acp-session-delete-wire.test.ts (171 pass, 0 fail)

bun test test/workflow-gate-broker.test.ts --test-name-pattern 'quarantines|keeps a corrupt FileGateStore locked|loads a structurally valid'
bun test test/notifications-session-switch.test.ts --test-name-pattern 'session_switch reissues pending workflow-gate presentations'
executorQa.evidence: Independent executor red-team (32-G004ExecQa) adversarially probed ACP re-key collision/eviction/no-resurrection with a real bridge request bound to the new id, FileGateStore quarantine + sticky .corrupt.lock + preserved sequence high-water on reopen, and emit-before-switch gate presentation reissue resolving the original gate id; it added one adversarial ACP regression test and recorded every command in test-results/ultragoal-g004/executor-qa.md. Leader verification reran the 10-file affected union (171 pass), package tsc, root check:ts workspace gate, and structural rebase checks after rebasing onto the moved origin/dev tip.

surfaceEvidence.description: All ACP, gate-broker, scopes, and notification behaviors verified through focused package tests and type checks after the rebase onto the current origin/dev tip.

adversarialCases.scenario: Extension switchSession targets a session id already owned by another ACP record
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Operation fails closed; pre-existing target record remains functional; mutated source record is evicted and disposed; no half-keyed state
adversarialCases.description: Live test drives a real managed-target collision; target lookups still resolve, mutated record rejected, disposal observed.

adversarialCases.scenario: Extension lifecycle action races a concurrent close of its source session
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Re-key refused before the lifecycle callback runs; closed record is not resurrected
adversarialCases.description: Adversarial regression test added by independent QA proves pre-call source-removal rejection.

adversarialCases.scenario: Persisted gate state tampered: missing resolution, mismatched answer hashes, wrong schema_hash, missing gate fields, malformed ackPolicy/options, counter rollback
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Every malformed state quarantines with a sticky .corrupt.lock; reopening throws until manual marker removal; valid state still loads; sequences never reuse
adversarialCases.description: Nine quarantine fixtures pass, including dual answer-hash recomputation and post-quarantine sequence high-water preservation.

adversarialCases.scenario: Workflow gate emitted before a session_switch re-key
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Presentation is migrated to the new session id, old remote action invalidated, reissued action's reply resolves the original gate id
adversarialCases.description: Emit-before-switch regression verifies old action invalidation, new-session reissue, and original-gate-id resolution.

contractCoverage.obligation: Transactional, fail-closed ACP session re-key with conflict preflight, no resurrection, and client-bridge/authority refresh in the same commit
State-discriminated, hash-verified, crash-durable FileGateStore validation with sticky quarantine
Pre-switch notification gate presentations survive session re-key and remain remotely answerable
Rebase remains structurally clean on the current origin/dev tip after all protocol fixes

rerunCommands: bun test <10-file affected union> (packages/coding-agent: 171 pass, 0 fail)
bun test src/**/*.test.ts src/**/*.test.tsx (packages/gjc-gui: 117 pass, 0 fail)
iteration.evidence: Iteration 1: executor-delegated G003 fixes; architect blocked with four HIGH findings (recorded as G004). Iteration 2: executor-delegated G004 fixes resolved the ACP and notification HIGHs; architect re-review blocked on two remaining FileGateStore HIGHs, which the leader fixed (full semantic validation with dual hash recomputation; directory fsync durability), then WATCH/APPROVE with one MEDIUM/P2. Iteration 3: leader closed the P2 (literal required:true, options validation, telegram ack updatedAt/outcome) with quarantine fixtures; final architect recheck CLEAR/APPROVE. After origin/dev moved, the branch was rebased onto the new tip (only upstream delta: scripts/dev-link.ts) and the full verification stack was rerun: GUI 117/117, protocol union 171/171, package tsc, root check:ts, clean diff, ancestor relation.
